scripts.electron:prepare: rm -rf gojo-desktop/src/renderer && cd gojo-mobile && pnpm build:web && cd .. && cp -r gojo-mobile/dist/ gojo-desktop/src/renderer && sed -i 's|/_expo|./_expo|g' gojo-desktop/src/renderer/index.html
scripts.electron:build: cd gojo-desktop && pnpm build && rm -rf out/renderer && cp -r src/renderer out/renderer && npx electron-builder --linux
